findings.evidence_context: Inside TestLogin: `Login(context.Background(), srv.URL, "user@example.com", "plaintext")` — call to test the login helper against a stub httptest server. Uses the IANA-reserved example.com domain (RFC 2606).

Inside TestLogin_BadCredentials: `Login(context.Background(), srv.URL, "bad@example.com", "wrong")` — bad-credentials path test against a stub server. Uses the IANA-reserved example.com domain (RFC 2606).
